heading: Representation; attorneys’ fees
label: 8127 Representation; attorneys’ fees

children.label: a
children.text: A claimant may authorize an individual to represent him in any proceeding under this subchapter before the Secretary of Labor.

children.label: b
children.text: A claim for legal or other services furnished in respect to a case, claim, or award for compensation under this subchapter is valid only if approved by the Secretary.
